properties.Observation: A large water storage tank, 50,000 Liters is being constructed to distribute water to 150 families. The constructed tank is in a dilapidated condition. Filter tank is also same capacity and also dilapidated condition. Anicut also dilapidated condition.
properties.Description:
Construction of Concrete anicut of  4.0 m length and height 1.5 m.

Clearing the site

Common excavation for foundation or quarry materials and haul the surplus up to 30m by Manually.

Plywood form work including making, fixing & removing for structure -
